title: Grove Relation Edge
description: A typed, directed edge between two contributions in the Grove contribution graph. This is the materialized edge form used in storage and API responses. In contribution manifests, relations are embedded without source_cid or created_at (which are derived from the containing contribution).

source_cid.description: CID of the contribution that declares this relation (the source of the edge).

target_cid.description: CID of the contribution being referenced (the target of the edge).

metadata.description: Optional metadata for this relation. Contents vary by relation type — see RELATIONS.md for recommended shapes.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this relation was created. Denormalized from the source contribution's created_at field.

relation_type.description: The type of directed edge between contributions.
